<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Get JWKS"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/v2alpha1/derivedKeys/jwks.json"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Returns the JSON Web Key Set (RFC 7517) with the public keys needed to verify JWT tokens issued by this service. Keys are loaded
from configuration (file://, https://, or base64:// URIs).

```http
GET /v2alpha1/derivedKeys/jwks.json
```

<ParamsDetails></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema {...require("./get-jwks.RequestSchema.json")}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes {...require("./get-jwks.StatusCodes.json")}></StatusCodes>
